## Employees
Tony Wilson (N/A):  Sam Perry (N/A):  Joseph Hall (N/A):  Adam Khalil (N/A): [...] ## Overview
We are in transition. We’re a small team supporting the digital landscape of a diverse portfolio of companies. Every day is different with opportunities to grow. We work with a mixture of legacy and new technologies, across different industries, to solve problems that make a difference. Formed in 2020, our primary objective is to deliver secure IT operations and we service several international private businesses within Shipping, Real Estate, Energy, Banking and Investments. Our teams are based across the US, UK and Asia. Underpinning our business is a drive to provide innovation and we work with a mixture of legacy and new technologies to solve problems that make a difference.

### Planning & Workflows

Get a grip on your planning and make optimal use of your capacity with smart planning software. Our solution helps organizations to plan, execute and continuously adjust their daily activities, regardless of whether you work with projects, orders or recurring processes. This allows you to work more efficiently, create peace and order on the work floor, and steer for results with up-to-date, data-driven insights.
